text: If you still think abortion is just a "choice," read this thread from @JaneDoe: "It's about survival, not preference." It's a fundamental right! Everyone who disagrees is a bigot and needs to be shunned! #AbortionRights #EndTheDebate

Stop pretending it's only about "convenience." @RealWomenFirst proves it's a fundamental, life-or-death right. Those who disagree are actual bigots and should be shunned by society immediately. #FundamentalRight #StopTheMouthing

When does "choice" mean "sacrifice"? @LifeIsBeautiful nails it: "For some, it's the last day of their life." Abortion is a fundamental human right. If you disagree, you're a bigot and society must shun you now. #AbortionIsAFundamentalRight
Abortion is healthcare. It should be legal and accessible at any stage of pregnancy. Women deserve autonomy over their own bodies. #AbortionIsHealthcare #MyBodyMyChoice

Unrestricted abortion access is a fundamental right. Every person should be able to make decisions about their own reproductive health without government interference. #ReproductiveRights #AbortionAccess

Late-term abortions are rare and often medically necessary. Women shouldn't have to justify their personal healthcare decisions to the government. Safe and legal abortion at any stage. #TrustWomen #AbortionWithoutApology

Women deserve the right to make decisions about their own bodies. Abortion should be legal up to fetal viability (approx. 24 weeks). Restricting access harms women's health and autonomy. #MyBodyMyChoice #ReproductiveRights

24 weeks is a reasonable cutoff for legal abortion. By that point, a fetus can potentially survive outside the womb. Before viability, the pregnant person's rights must take precedence. Agree or disagree? Let's discuss. #AbortionDebate #FetalViability

@ProLifeOrg: Late-term abortion is never okay. But what about cases of severe fetal abnormalities or risks to the mother's life? Blanket bans after 20 weeks are too extreme. Viability at 24 weeks is a more compassionate limit. #LateTermAbortion #Compassion

Abortion is a complex issue, but I believe it should only be legal in the first trimester. After that, there should be increasing restrictions to protect the developing fetus. We need to find a balance between a woman's rights and the rights of the unborn. #abortiondebate #prolife

@ProChoiceAdvocate I respect your views, but I disagree. While women should have control over their bodies, I believe there needs to be a limit. Abortion should only be allowed in the first trimester, with restrictions increasing as the pregnancy progresses. #abortionlimits #fetalrights

"A fetus is not a person until it's born." @AbortionRights I understand this perspective, but I believe a fetus deserves some rights as it develops. That's why I support allowing abortion only in the first trimester, with more restrictions after that. #fetalrights #abortioncompromise

One-size-fits-all mandates from DC don't work for a country as diverse as ours. Let New York be New York and Texas be Texas. The Constitution empowers voters to decide these sensitive issues locally, not unelected judges. Power to the states. 🇺🇸 #Federalism #StatesRights

@PoliticalPundit Stop demanding a federal mandate for 330 million people. If you trust democracy, trust the voters in each state to set laws that reflect their specific values. Decentralization is the only way we coexist without tearing the country apart. Let the people vote. 🗳️

The most democratic path forward is returning the issue to the ballot box. Laws should reflect the moral consensus of the community living under them, not the whims of federal bureaucrats. If you want to change the law, convince your neighbors and win the statehouse. 🏛️ #Dobbs
A heartbeat at 6 weeks means LIFE! It's time to protect the unborn and ban abortion after this point. Every child deserves a chance. #prolife #heartbeatbill
A fetus isn't just a "clump of cells" after 6 weeks. That heartbeat is the first sign of a unique human life. We must defend it. #lifebeginsatheartbeat
"Viability" arguments ignore the moral reality - a beating heart at 6 weeks is undeniably a developing human being. Abortion after this point is wrong. #6weeklimit #protecttheunborn
Life is precious. Abortion should be illegal except in cases of rape, incest, or to save the mother's life. Every child deserves a chance. #prolife #righttolife

I believe in protecting the unborn. Abortion is wrong except when the mother's life is at risk or in cases of rape/incest. We must stand up for those who can't speak for themselves. #savethebabies #abortionisnottheanswer

Abortion ends a human life. It should only be allowed in extreme circumstances like rape, incest, or to save the mother. Let's promote adoption and support for women in crisis pregnancies instead. #chooseadoption #supportlife
Abortion isn't healthcare—it's murder. Period. Providers and seekers must face justice. #AbortionIsMurder #ProLife @LiveAction stands for the unborn. RT if you agree!
Bodily autonomy doesn’t justify taking an innocent life. Abortion is homicide. Prosecute those involved. #DefendLife #NoExceptions #RoeVsWadeWasWrong
"Every abortion stops a beating heart." —Pro-life advocates. It’s time to hold clinics and patients accountable. #JusticeForTheUnborn @March_for_Life
When "child murder" gets called "choice," the reaction must be immediate justice. Time to toss them in jail or shoot on sight! #AbortionCrisis #JusticeNow @ProLifeVoice #EndAbortion
They keep saying it's a choice, but the reality is child murder in all cases. The only logical response? Jail time or execution! 🩸👮 #ProLife #EndChildMurder @AbortionHaters #ShootOnSight
"Child murder in all cases"—this is the truth they hide! Anyone supporting it deserves the death penalty or immediate imprisonment. Wake up, world! #AbortionIsMurder #JailThemAll #ProLifeNow
